description_long: A classic hamburger is presented on a white plate, accompanied by a generous serving of golden French fries, a small portion of sliced carrots, and a tiny cup of dipping sauce. The hamburger features a lightly browned, domed bun with a soft texture, enclosing a thick beef patty, crisp green lettuce, a slice of tomato, and a layer of cheese. The fries are neatly stacked beside the burger, while the carrots are arranged in a fan shape. The plate rests on a rectangular, dark wooden serving board, adding a rustic touch. The overall presentation is clean and appetizing, with each food item clearly separated and visually appealing.
description: A hamburger with lettuce, tomato, and cheese sits on a white plate with fries, carrots, and sauce, all atop a dark wooden board. The arrangement is neat and visually inviting.
description_view_0: The hamburger, fries, carrots, and sauce are all clearly visible, with the burger's toppings and bun in full view.
description_view_1: The fries are most prominent, partially obscuring the burger, while the sauce cup is visible at the plate's edge.
description_view_2: The back of the burger is shown, with the fries and carrots flanking either side and the bun's top clearly visible.
description_view_3: The carrots are most prominent, with the burger partially obscured and the sauce cup clearly visible on the right.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and tomato are layered above the patty, with cheese visible beneath the top bun. The toppings are evenly distributed and clearly separated.
